name: Browser Automation Test
description: E2E test for browser_automation meta-tool. Navigates to a URL and captures a screenshot.

testUrl.description: URL to navigate to and screenshot

invariants.condition: Complete this task DIRECTLY yourself. Do NOT use dispatch_new_job or dispatch_existing_job. Do NOT delegate to sub-agents. You have browser automation tools available - call them directly.
invariants.assessment: Verify the agent did NOT dispatch any child jobs and performed all browser actions directly using the available tools.

dont: Use list_tools or search_jobs instead of acting

invariants.condition: Call the navigate_page tool with url={{testUrl}} to navigate the browser to that URL. This is your FIRST action.
invariants.assessment: Verify navigate_page was called with the target URL as the first tool action.

do: Call navigate_page with url set to the target URL

invariants.condition: After navigation, call take_snapshot to get the page content and extract the page title from it.
invariants.assessment: Verify take_snapshot was called and the page title was extracted from the result.

do: Extract the title from the snapshot output

invariants.condition: Call take_screenshot to capture the page, then call create_artifact to save the screenshot.
invariants.assessment: Verify take_screenshot was called and create_artifact was used to persist it.

do: Call create_artifact with the screenshot data

invariants.condition: Return output as JSON: { "result": { "pageTitle": "<extracted title>", "screenshot": "<artifact description>" } }
invariants.assessment: Verify the output is valid JSON with pageTitle and screenshot fields populated from actual tool results.

do: Return valid JSON with result.pageTitle from take_snapshot
